extraction.one_line_summary: SOLER Marc won from a breakaway in Belleville-en-Beaujolais, holding off JORGENSON and VERDUGO after a relentlessly aggressive opening.
tactical_patterns: Lidl-Trek launched repeated early attacks on Cat-3 climbs forcing break selection before km 140, unusual aggression.
UAE team radio emphasized GC riders staying vigilant on Cat-3 climbs, treating hilly transition stages as GC threat.
Polkadot jersey POWLESS abandoned early KOM contest despite points available, prioritizing survival for bigger mountain stages Saturday/Sunday.

rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: first Tour stage win since 2016, Spanish team manager predicted stage win confidence pre-race
rider_signals.JORGENSON Matteo: positive: best Tour finish ever for Boise rider, second place after significant attacking/chasing work
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: neutral: polkadot lead shrunk 18 to 16 points by choosing survival over contesting Cat-1 climbs early
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive:sprinter survived relentless Cat-3 attacks to contest finish group, unexpected durability on 3100m elevation gain
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: crashed hard on narrow chip-seal descent during early aggressive phase, team car positioning failed
